##LOCALITY=Tom's quarry, Kapunda, South Australia, Australia
##OWNER=RRUFF
##SOURCE=Marcus Origlieri
##DESCRIPTION=Sprays or white, thin platy crystals, associated with colorless minyulite , R100072, and colorless needles of wavellite.

##FILETYPE=Raman RAW
##RAMAN WAVELENGTH=780
